title: One Punch Ends Bellamy’s Boast
description: Luffy goes back to Bellamy not for pride, but to defend Cricket’s dream and the promise of Sky Island.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. Luffy goes back to Bellamy not for pride, but to defend Cricket’s dream and the promise of Sky Island.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: I was just talkin' about you...

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Oh... You mean that thing Mont Blanc Cricket had.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: So I'm here to take it back!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Know how to throw a punch? Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Even 30 million is doubtful for him.

summary: Luffy goes back to Bellamy not for pride, but to defend Cricket’s dream and the promise of Sky Island.
